name: changeyard
description: Generic markdown-first local change workflow manager prototype.

scripts.build:cli: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/src/templates dist/src/planning/templates/prompts && cp src/templates/*.md dist/src/templates/ && cp src/planning/templates/prompts/*.md dist/src/planning/templates/prompts/
scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:kanban
scripts.check:node: npm run build:cli && npm --workspace @changeyard/kanban run typecheck
scripts.check:tui: npm --workspace @changeyard/tui run typecheck && node scripts/verify-tui-endpoints.mjs && npm --workspace @changeyard/tui run test
